calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-04-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-04-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings Not Reported.

John P. Zanghi, Esq. appeared for plaintiff John Stewart Company.
Ron Bowen, Senior Regional Manager for plaintif John Stewart Company, and Vanessa Funes, defendant's Case Manager at the Salvation Army, were placed under and testified.
No appearance by defendant Edward Minarsch.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on January 24, 2019.
Defendant Edward Minarsch's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on January 30, 2019.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on February 14, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, March 4, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff John Stewart Company, and against defendant Edward Minarsch, as follows:

Holdover Damages - $737.28.
Costs - $315.00.
Total: $1,052.28.

Additionally, plaintiff John Stewart Company is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 242 Turk Street, #816, San Francisco, CA 94102.

The Rental Agreement is Canceled and the Lease is Forfeited.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Adrian Colley, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported.

Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present, represented by Alzina Khalam.
Attorney John Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant Edward Minarsch is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there is no appearance by defendant. The trial date of March 4, 2019 remains on calendar. (501)
